case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. EBEN RUBOTTOM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED AUG-31-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WEBB, KORY
DECLARATION KATHRYN QUETEL FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RUBOTTOM, EBEN CONTINI, REGINA WEBB, KORY DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RUBOTTOM, EBEN CONTINI, REGINA WEBB, KORY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBOTTOM, EBEN CONTINI, REGINA WEBB, KORY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 440 8TH AVENUE, #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, -INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS
